zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert d'Estouteville於大約1410年出生在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利瓦爾蒙特時，他的父親Guilliame d’Estouteville32歲，母親Jeanne de Doudeauville29歲。他和Ambroisee de Lore至少有1個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1479年6月3日在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲享年70歲。

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert d'Estouteville was born about 1410, in Valmont, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France, his father, Guilliame d’Estouteville, was 32 and his mother, Jeanne de Doudeauville, was 29. He had at least 1 son and 4 daughters with Ambroisee de Lore. He died on 3 June 1479, in Paris, Île-de-France, France, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert d'Estouteville est né environ 1410, à Valmont, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France, son père, Guilliame d’Estouteville, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Jeanne de Doudeauville, avait 29 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles avec Ambroisee de Lore. Il est décédé le 3 juin 1479, à Paris, Île-de-France, France, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert d'Estouteville um 1410 in Valmont, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guilliame d’Estouteville 32 und seine Mutter Jeanne de Doudeauville 29. Er hatte mit Ambroisee de Lore mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 3. Juni 1479 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert d'Estouteville è nato il circa 1410 nel Valmont, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Guilliame d’Estouteville, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Jeanne de Doudeauville, aveva 29 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie con Ambroisee de Lore. Morì il 3 giugno 1479, nel Paris, Île-de-France, Francia, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert d'Estoutevilleが約1410年にフランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメヴァルモントで生まれた時，父Guilliame d’Estoutevilleは32歳，母Jeanne de Doudeauvilleは29歳であった。彼はAmbroisee de Loreとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1479年6月3日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスパーイスで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert d'Estouteville(이)가 대략 1410년 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 발몽에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guilliame d’Estouteville(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Jeanne de Doudeauville(은)는 29세였다. 그는 Ambroisee de Lore(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1479년 6월 3일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert d'Estouteville nasceu aproximadamente 1410, em Valmont, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França, seu pai, Guilliame d’Estouteville, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne de Doudeauville, tinha 29 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas com Ambroisee de Lore. Ele faleceu em 3 de junho de 1479, em Paris, Île-de-France, França, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert d'Estouteville родился около 1410 г. в местности валмонт, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Guilliame d’Estouteville было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Jeanne de Doudeauville, 29. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери от Ambroisee de Lore. Он умер 3 июня 1479 г. в местности пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert d'Estouteville nació aproximadamente 1410, en Valmont, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Guilliame d’Estouteville, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Jeanne de Doudeauville, tenía 29 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas con Ambroisee de Lore. Murió el 3 de junio de 1479, en Paris, Île-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 70 años.
